nasb.text: They have counseled only to thrust him down from his high position; They delight in falsehood; They bless with their mouth, But inwardly they curse. Selah.

esv.text: They only plan to thrust him down from his high position. They take pleasure in falsehood. They bless with their mouths, but inwardly they curse. Selah

cnv.text: 他們彼此商議， 務要把他從尊位上拉下來； 他們喜愛謊話； 他們口雖祝福，心卻咒詛。

ccb.text: 你们千方百计把我从高位拉下。 你们善于说谎，嘴上祝福， 心却咒诅。（细拉）

csbs.text: 他们彼此商议，只为把他从高位上赶下来； 他们喜悦虚谎， 口中虽祝福，心中却诅咒。细拉
